dsviper>=1.2.10

# Qt UI for graph_editor.py and dsviper_components/.
# Pinned to guarantee reproducible regeneration of ui_*.py and
# resources_rc.py via dev/build.py — different pyside6-uic versions
# silently produce different generated files (just a header version
# stamp today, but the discipline matters once non-trivial diffs
# appear). Aligned with dsviper-tools.
PySide6==6.10.1
